title: The Osteomancer's Daughter
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A woman who can read the dead in their bones is hired by a grieving industrialist to commune with his drowned wife, but the wife's skeleton tells a story of murder that reaches into the city's founding.
long_description: A woman who can read the dead in their bones is hired by a grieving industrialist to commune with his drowned wife, but the wife's skeleton tells a story of murder that reaches into the city's founding.
